arts.ttl: Premier League: Predictions for all seven games on Saturday
arts.sum: The Premier League reaches matchday eight this weekend and James Mason has highlighted our writers' best bets for all seven games taking place in the top-flight on Saturday.

arts.ttl: Howard Webb admits he got 'taken to the cleaners' by Everton at 'toxic' Goodison Park
arts.sum: Refereeing chief Howard Webb has recalled a game at Goodison Park where he believes he got "taken to the cleaners"

arts.ttl: Ipswich Town: Jacob Greaves has 'really bright future', says McKenna
arts.oTtl: East Anglican Daily Times - Ispwich Town FC
arts.sum: The 24-year-old has been one of the Blues’ best performers in the early stages of the Premier League season, starting all seven games and winning the supporters’ vote for August Player of the Month. Jacob Greaves has taken to life in the Premier League very well (Image: Ross Halls) “He's adapted very well, no doubt about it,” said McKenna, discussing a player who already has more than 200 senior career starts to his name.

arts.ttl: Everton takeover: Dan Friedkin gets £900m boost as supporter protest planned
arts.sum: A round-up of articles relating to the Friedkin Group's Everton takeover deal from over the past week

arts.ttl: Sean Dyche makes admission over January transfers as Everton could sanction multiple exits
arts.sum: The Blues boss has been impressed with starlets Harrison Armstrong and Roman Dixon and faces a dilemma in January when the club considers their individual needs against those of the first team

arts.ttl: 'They are huge': Darren Bent insists London-based PL manager wouldn't take 'bigger club' Everton job
arts.sum: There has been huge pressure on Sean Dyche at Everton this season. When you are a club the size of Everton and you find yourself...

arts.ttl: Everton get cruel reminder at Finch Farm as search for injury answers continues
arts.sum: Everton FC correspondent Joe Thomas reports from Finch Farm after Sean Dyche's pre-Ipswich Town press conference

arts.ttl: Sean Dyche: Thomas Tuchel right for England job but most would like English boss
arts.sum: German Tuchel has been appointed new England coach on an 18-month deal

arts.ttl: Ipswich Town transfer news: Tractors boys interested in 21-time international?
arts.sum: Ipswich Town are reportedly interested in signing Chelsea defender Ben Chilwell in January, with the left-back desperate to secure first-team football.

arts.ttl: Friedkin Group can solve overdue Everton problem at new stadium to make perfect first impression
arts.sum: On the anniversary of Neville Southall's debut, ECHO Everton reporter Chris Beesley has reiterated his desire for the Blues to build a statue of their record-breaking former goalkeeper at their new stadium
